_description: Reproduction fixture for Q3.6-3 (auto-close <think> before <tool_call> + </thinking> hallucination recovery). The history assistant turn contains a `<think>...` block followed by a `<tool_call>` WITHOUT a `</think>` between them — simulating the model emitting a tool call mid-reasoning without closing the think tag. Without Q3.6-3 the unclosed think wraps around the tool call, breaking parsers; with Q3.6-3 the template injects `</think>` before the tool call boundary.
_bug: Originated in allanchan339's qwen3.6-enhanced.jinja (commit 13556c0, 2026-05-02). Cross-referenced in r/LocalLLaMA 1t4cev0 (snapshotted). Generalized to recognize </thinking> hallucination in fakezeta's merged template (gist 9e8e039c, snapshotted).

messages.content:
<think>Let me check the weather tool<tool_call>
<function=get_weather>
<parameter=city>
SF
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
